news.title:
IndusInd Bank states SFIO probe on accounting issues was disclosed.
Bank says no info on SFIO summons; commits to compliance, transparency.
news.summary:
IndusInd Bank states SFIO probe on accounting issues was disclosed.
Bank says no info on SFIO summons; commits to compliance, transparency.

news.title:
Catalyst Trusteeship disclosed creating encumbrance on 50.3M IndusInd Bank shares under SEBI regulations.
Encumbrance secures a $1.45B loan involving J.P. Morgan, Barclays, Citi, Deutsche Bank as lenders.
news.summary:
Catalyst Trusteeship disclosed creating encumbrance on 50.3M IndusInd Bank shares under SEBI regulations.
Encumbrance secures a $1.45B loan involving J.P. Morgan, Barclays, Citi, Deutsche Bank as lenders.

news.title:
Indusind Bank promoters released pledged shares, 7.67% of total shares.
Promoter holding at 15.08%; pledges with Barclays, Deutsche for loan/security.
news.summary:
Indusind Bank promoters released pledged shares, 7.67% of total shares.
Promoter holding at 15.08%; pledges with Barclays, Deutsche for loan/security.

news.title: IndusInd Bank reports under SEBI Takeover Regulations (2011) as per Regulation 29(3).
news.summary: IndusInd Bank reports under SEBI Takeover Regulations (2011) as per Regulation 29(3).

news.title:
IndusInd Bank Ltd. is rated Hold by MarketsMojo as of 18 March 2026.
Analysis reflects IndusInd Bank's current fundamentals and performance as of 30 March 2026.
news.summary:
IndusInd Bank Ltd. is rated Hold by MarketsMojo as of 18 March 2026.
Analysis reflects IndusInd Bank's current fundamentals and performance as of 30 March 2026.

news.title: IndusInd Intl Holdings released its pledge on 4.1% equity in IndusInd Bank.
news.summary: IndusInd Intl Holdings released its pledge on 4.1% equity in IndusInd Bank.

news.title:
IndusInd Bank fell 3.4% this week, closing at Rs.791.85, underperforming Sensex (-1.46%).
The week saw sharp intraday lows, higher derivatives OI, and valuation shifts amid market volatility.
news.summary:
IndusInd Bank fell 3.4% this week, closing at Rs.791.85, underperforming Sensex (-1.46%).
The week saw sharp intraday lows, higher derivatives OI, and valuation shifts amid market volatility.

news.title: RBI may alter IndusInd Bank's board after over a year of hedging scandal.
news.summary: RBI may alter IndusInd Bank's board after over a year of hedging scandal.

news.title:
IndusInd Bank saw Rs. 44.4 crore NSE block trade for 559,654 shares.
The trade was executed at Rs. 792.5 per share.
news.summary:
IndusInd Bank saw Rs. 44.4 crore NSE block trade for 559,654 shares.
The trade was executed at Rs. 792.5 per share.

news.title:
IndusInd Bank's Siddharth Banerjee resigns as Head of Global Markets Group citing personal reasons.
Vasudeva Konda, ex-ICICI Bank executive, appointed as new Head of Global Markets Group effective March 23, 2026.
news.summary:
IndusInd Bank's Siddharth Banerjee resigns as Head of Global Markets Group citing personal reasons.
Vasudeva Konda, ex-ICICI Bank executive, appointed as new Head of Global Markets Group effective March 23, 2026.

news.title:
IndusInd Bank shares rose 2.3% to Rs 839.45, with Citi maintaining a 'sell' rating and a target price of Rs 800.
The bank targets 1% RoA by FY27, aims for growth by FY28-29, and reported weak Q3 profits, down 89% YoY to Rs 161 crore.
news.summary:
IndusInd Bank shares rose 2.3% to Rs 839.45, with Citi maintaining a 'sell' rating and a target price of Rs 800.
The bank targets 1% RoA by FY27, aims for growth by FY28-29, and reported weak Q3 profits, down 89% YoY to Rs 161 crore.

news.title:
IndusInd Bank sees 12.1% rise in open interest despite weak stock momentum.
Rising volumes and price decline indicate evolving market positioning by traders.
news.summary:
IndusInd Bank sees 12.1% rise in open interest despite weak stock momentum.
Rising volumes and price decline indicate evolving market positioning by traders.

news.title:
IndusInd Bank held an analyst/investor meet on March 12, 2026, in Mumbai.
No sensitive information was shared; presentation is available on IndusInd's website.
news.summary:
IndusInd Bank held an analyst/investor meet on March 12, 2026, in Mumbai.
No sensitive information was shared; presentation is available on IndusInd's website.

news.title:
SAT rejects Arun Khurana's plea to access SEBI's 1.7TB data in IndusInd insider trading case.
IndusInd Bank's stock fell 33% post accounting lapses, now up 2% since March; closed 2% lower at ₹917 on BSE.
news.summary:
SAT rejects Arun Khurana's plea to access SEBI's 1.7TB data in IndusInd insider trading case.
IndusInd Bank's stock fell 33% post accounting lapses, now up 2% since March; closed 2% lower at ₹917 on BSE.

news.title:
SEBI collected 1.7 TB of emails for insider trading probe into IndusInd Bank.
SAT denied former Deputy CEO's request for access to investigation materials.
news.summary:
SEBI collected 1.7 TB of emails for insider trading probe into IndusInd Bank.
SAT denied former Deputy CEO's request for access to investigation materials.

news.title:
IndusInd Bank witnessed a block trade of ~630,725 shares at ₹950.4.
The total transaction value of the trade stood at ₹59.94 crores.
news.summary:
IndusInd Bank witnessed a block trade of ~630,725 shares at ₹950.4.

news.title:
IndusInd Bank CEO aims to rejuvenate growth with a new team setup.
Changes in assurance and business teams to be completed by March 31.
news.summary:
IndusInd Bank CEO aims to rejuvenate growth with a new team setup.

news.title:
IndusInd Bank hosted an investor meet on Feb 23, 2026, in Mumbai.
No unpublished price-sensitive info was shared; details are on the bank's website.

news.title:
PSBs surpass private banks as quarterly profits reach new highs.
Only 3 of 30 listed universal banks had >1% net NPAs in Q3.
news.summary:
PSBs surpass private banks as quarterly profits reach new highs.
Only 3 of 30 listed universal banks had >1% net NPAs in Q3.

news.title:
Emkay Global upgrades IndusInd Bank to 'Buy' with a target price of ₹1,100, implying a 17% upside.
The bank's RoA is projected to improve to 1.3-1.5% by FY28-29, supported by better asset quality and efficiency.
news.summary:
Emkay Global upgrades IndusInd Bank to 'Buy' with a target price of ₹1,100, implying a 17% upside.
The bank's RoA is projected to improve to 1.3-1.5% by FY28-29, supported by better asset quality and efficiency.
